title: useImagePopup

You can copy and paste this code directly to start using the function immediately.`}),` `,(0,l.jsx)(n,{name:"use-image-popup",code:`"use client";\r import React, { useEffect } from "react";\r import { attachBodyProperty, attributeState, detachBodyProperty, useMeasureScrollbar } from "./use-measure-scrollbar";\r \r type Selectors = React.ElementType | (string & {});\r interface PopupOptions {\r timeRender?: number;\r }\r \r export function useImagePopup(selectors: Selectors = ".embeded-image", options: PopupOptions = {}) {\r const { timeRender = 350 } = options;\r const [hasScrollbar, scrollbarWidth] = useMeasureScrollbar();\r \r useEffect(() => {\r const imgElements = document.querySelectorAll(selectors as string);\r const body = document.body;\r \r if (!imgElements.length) return;\r \r const handleImageClick = (event: Event) => {\r const clickedImage = event.currentTarget as HTMLImageElement;\r let figure = document.querySelector(".popup-container") as HTMLElement;\r \r if (!figure) {\r clickedImage.style.filter = "opacity(0)";\r body.style.overflow = "hidden";\r \r if (hasScrollbar) attachBodyProperty(scrollbarWidth);\r \r const rect = clickedImage.getBoundingClientRect();\r \r figure = document.createElement("figure");\r figure.classList.add("popup-container");\r figure.style.setProperty("--duration", \`\${timeRender - 50}ms\`);\r body.appendChild(figure);\r \r const overlay = document.createElement("div");\r overlay.classList.add("image-popup-overlay");\r figure.appendChild(overlay);\r \r const imgPopup = document.createElement("img");\r imgPopup.src = clickedImage.src;\r \r attributeState(imgPopup, "open");\r \r imgPopup.classList.add("image-popup");\r imgPopup.draggable = false;\r imgPopup.oncontextmenu = e => e.preventDefault();\r \r imgPopup.style.position = "absolute";\r imgPopup.style.setProperty("--initial-w", \`\${rect.width}px\`);\r imgPopup.style.setProperty("--initial-h", \`\${rect.height}px\`);\r \r figure.appendChild(imgPopup);\r \r imgPopup.getBoundingClientRect();\r \r imgPopup.style.setProperty("--translate-in", \`\${(window.innerWidth / 2 - rect.left - rect.width / 2) * -1}px, \${(window.innerHeight / 2 - rect.top - rect.height / 2) * -1}px\`);\r \r const closePopup = () => {\r attributeState(imgPopup, "closed");\r overlay.style.opacity = "0";\r \r setTimeout(() => {\r clickedImage.style.removeProperty("filter");\r body.style.removeProperty("overflow");\r figure.remove();\r \r if (hasScrollbar) detachBodyProperty();\r }, timeRender);\r };\r \r overlay.addEventListener("click", closePopup);\r \r const handlePopstate = (event: PopStateEvent) => {\r closePopup();\r event.preventDefault();\r };\r \r window.history.pushState({ drawerOpen: true }, "");\r window.addEventListener("popstate", handlePopstate);\r \r return () => window.removeEventListener("popstate", handlePopstate);\r }\r };\r \r imgElements.forEach(img => img.addEventListener("click", handleImageClick));\r \r return () => {\r imgElements.forEach(img => img.removeEventListener("click", handleImageClick));\r };\r }, [selectors, hasScrollbar, scrollbarWidth, timeRender]);\r }`,ext:".ts",repo:"web/hooks/use-image-popup.ts",css:`/* use-image-popup */\r @layer base {\r .embeded-image {\r cursor: zoom-in;\r }\r .popup-container,\r .image-popup-overlay {\r display: flex;\r justify-content: center;\r align-items: center;\r inset: 0;\r width: 100%;\r height: 100%;\r overflow: hidden;\r transition: all var(--duration) ease 0ms;\r }\r .popup-container {\r position: fixed;\r z-index: 9999;\r }\r .image-popup-overlay {\r position: absolute;\r cursor: zoom-out;\r background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--overlay-bg-from, #0000), var(--overlay-bg-to, hsl(var(--pure-black) / 0.4)));\r }\r .image-popup {\r border-radius: var(--radius);\r height: auto;\r width: auto;\r max-width: 95dvw !important;\r max-height: 95dvh !important;\r z-index: 999 !important;\r background-color: var(--img-bg);\r position: relative;\r vertical-align: middle;\r object-fit: contain;\r transform-origin: center;\r --img-bg: #e5e5e5;\r }\r .image-popup[data-state="open"] {\r animation: zoom-state-open var(--duration, 0.3s) cubic-bezier(0.5, 0, 0.25, 1) normal forwards running;\r }\r .image-popup[data-state="closed"] {\r animation: zoom-state-closed var(--duration, 0.3s) cubic-bezier(0.5, 0, 0.25, 1) normal forwards running;\r }\r @keyframes zoom-state-open {\r from {\r var(--img-bg);\r }\r }\r @keyframes zoom-state-closed {\r from {\r width: auto;\r height: auto;\r transform: translate(0, 0);\r background-color: var(--img-bg);\r }\r to {\r -o-object-fit: unset;\r
